name: NorthIsle Copper and Gold Inc.
description: NorthIsle Copper and Gold Inc. is a junior developer advancing the North Island Project, a large copper-gold porphyry deposit located near Port Hardy on northern Vancouver Island, British Columbia. The project covers over 34,000 hectares of mineral claims adjacent to BHP Billiton's former Island Copper Mine, benefiting from existing brownfield infrastructure. The company completed a resource update and PEA and is executing a disciplined 2026 plan to advance what it calls one of the most compelling copper development stories in Canada.
